system.description: At the beginning of each mission sometime before the end of the briefing, pick the text of a skill, ability, or item from any Tabletop Role-Playing Game. You may use the target skill, ability, or item in your game of Triangle Agency during this Mission. Making sense of how it works is a responsibility shared by the whole team. After each time you use the target skill, ability, or item, roll [quality].

outcomes.success: you cannot use the target skill, ability, or item again during this Mission. You can select another at the beginning of the next Mission.
outcomes.sixplus3s: you can use the target skill, ability, or item again during this Mission.
outcomes.failure: you cannot use anything from the same Tabletop Role-Playing Game the text was from, including the target skill, ability, or item, ever again.
